description: Style NoteInspired by the shimmering hues of the crystal, the bulgari Omnia Crystalline is by Alberto Morillas. On first use, it'll seem to have little in common with its parent scent: it is notably more aquatic! Product DetailsThis perfume is a musky woody fragrance with notes of bamboo, nashi pear, lotus flower and balsa wood.CautionFlammableKeep away from source of ignition Keep away from childrenDo not use near fire, Flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize65 ML
